dev.jeka.core.api.marshalling.xml

Class JkDomDocument

  • java.lang.Object
    • dev.jeka.core.api.marshalling.xml.JkDomDocument

  • public final class JkDomDocument
extends java.lang.Object
    Borrowed from VincerDom https://github.com/djeang/vincer-dom Wrapper for Document offering a Parent-Chaining fluent interface.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      org.w3c.dom.Document getW3cDocument()
      Returns thd underlying w3c Document.
      static JkDomDocument of(org.w3c.dom.Document w3cDocument)
      Creates a JkDomDocument wrapping the specified w3c document.
      static JkDomDocument of(java.lang.String rootName)
      Creates a document with a root element of the specified name.
      static JkDomDocument parse(java.io.InputStream inputStream)
      Same as parse(InputStream, DocumentBuilder) but using a default DocumentBuilder.
      static JkDomDocument parse(java.io.InputStream inputStream, javax.xml.parsers.DocumentBuilder documentBuilder)
      Creates a JkDomDocument by parsing the content of specified input stream.
      static JkDomDocument parse(java.nio.file.Path file)
      Creates a JkDomDocument from the specified xml file.
      static JkDomDocument parse(java.lang.String xml) 
      void print(java.io.OutputStream out)
      Outputs xml in the specified stream.
      void print(java.io.OutputStream out, java.util.function.Consumer<org.w3c.dom.DOMConfiguration> domConfigurationConfigurer)
      Same as print(OutputStream) but caller can modify the default XML transformer using the specified Consumer.
      JkDomElement root()
      Returns the root element of this document.
      void save(java.nio.file.Path file)
      Saves this document in the specified file.
      java.lang.String toXml()
      Returns an XML String representation of this document.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • of

        public static JkDomDocument of(org.w3c.dom.Document w3cDocument)
        Creates a JkDomDocument wrapping the specified w3c document.

      • of

        public static JkDomDocument of(java.lang.String rootName)
        Creates a document with a root element of the specified name.

      • parse

        public static JkDomDocument parse(java.io.InputStream inputStream,
                                  javax.xml.parsers.DocumentBuilder documentBuilder)
        Creates a JkDomDocument by parsing the content of specified input stream. The stream content is parsed with the specified documentBuilder.

      • parse

        public static JkDomDocument parse(java.io.InputStream inputStream)
        Same as parse(InputStream, DocumentBuilder) but using a default DocumentBuilder.

      • parse

        public static JkDomDocument parse(java.lang.String xml)

      • parse

        public static JkDomDocument parse(java.nio.file.Path file)
        Creates a JkDomDocument from the specified xml file.

      • getW3cDocument

        public org.w3c.dom.Document getW3cDocument()
        Returns thd underlying w3c Document.

      • root

        public JkDomElement root()
        Returns the root element of this document.

      • print

        public void print(java.io.OutputStream out)
        Outputs xml in the specified stream.

      • save

        public void save(java.nio.file.Path file)
        Saves this document in the specified file.

      • print

        public void print(java.io.OutputStream out,
                  java.util.function.Consumer<org.w3c.dom.DOMConfiguration> domConfigurationConfigurer)
        Same as print(OutputStream) but caller can modify the default XML transformer using the specified Consumer.

      • toXml

        public java.lang.String toXml()
        Returns an XML String representation of this document.
